data.description:
## What

Turn on the cross-ticket overlap detector (epic only-crave-art) for THIS project by
setting `verify.overlap_enabled = true` in the tracked project config `rebar.toml`.
The feature shipped gated OFF by default; this flips it on so plan-review runs the
advisory store-wide overlap step and surfaces `overlap[]` suggestions.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `rebar.toml` `[verify]` section sets `overlap_enabled = true` with an explanatory comment.
- [ ] No other config keys change; the file still parses (local build, not stale global).
- [ ] Commit references this ticket (rebar-ticket trailer) and passes `make lint`.
- [ ] Change lands on `main` through Gerrit (LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1).

## Scope

- `rebar.toml` only. No source/behavior change — the flag is read by
  `verify.overlap_enabled` (`src/rebar/_config_schema.py`) and consumed in the
  plan-review path. Rollback is setting it back to false.
data.title: Enable store-wide overlap detection in project rebar.toml
